2026-04-16T07:53:21.9394619Z   github-token: ***
2026-04-16T07:53:21.9396281Z   script: const { setupGlobals } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/setup_globals.cjs');
setupGlobals(core, github, context, exec, io, getOctokit);

await main();
